pr.title: Record: Int6 MLP3x + SmearGate + BigramHash + MuonWD + SWA (mean val_bpb=1.1483)

output.summary: Int6-quantized GPT9 ups the MLP to 3× while adding SmearGate/BigramHash context and pairing muon WD with SWA for smoother weights.
techniques: Per-row int6 quantization with zstd to free bytes for a 3× MLP expansion.
SmearGate gate plus BigramHash embeddings add lightweight bigram context.
Muon weight decay with momentum warmup and SWA smoothing for quantization-friendly weights.
